description: End-to-end gate for the open-vocab rebuild (WP-I). 'expected' is the plan's acceptance target; 'recorded' is the real verification result on prod; 'gaps' documents the honest shortfalls against the target.
address_note: Proxy for '3 BLACK SWAN RISE BEELIAR' which is missing from G-NAF.

recorded.method: synth_property_facts against the real Beeliar parcel (cadastre 1585770); live auto-resolution is licence-gated so the parcel was bound directly to isolate the spatial+engine path.
recorded.wp_e_cleanup: Adversarial review (113 Sonnet agents) over the 1726 check-backing rules rejected 419 (~25%) whose quote contradicted their canonical key; clusters cleaned, no false-alarm fails remain.

gaps: pass_or_fail (1) < target 10: synth provides LOT MEASUREMENTS (area/width/depth); setbacks, heights, garage, etc. require PROPOSED design values from a drawing upload and correctly return needs_more_info. The >=10 target is unreachable from spatial synth alone — it needs a proposal/drawing.

site_area and other lot-AREA checks are intentionally needs_more_info (not auto-evaluated): the R-Codes lot-size rules were extracted with inconsistent operators (eq/lt where the table means 'at least'), so comparing a real lot area could mislead. Operator-level curation is the remaining WP-E follow-up; install sentence-transformers/hdbscan for embedding-based clustering to further sharpen the canonical keys.

LIVE auto-resolution for Beeliar is blocked by dataset governance: Landgate cadastre (lgate-001) and DPLH planning (dplh-*) are approval_status=pending_review with restricted licence ('commercial use unconfirmed'). The resolver correctly refuses non-approved restricted data. Approving them is an operator legal decision; once approved, resolution runs the same synth proven here.
